group_1.textLeft: Um... Who are you...?

group_1.textRight: The one and only Nagisa.

group_1.textLeft: Nagisa...san.
(She's a Magical Girl, too.)

group_1.textRight: You'd better head for home.

group_1.textLeft: Ah...well, um.
A Witch got away on me earlier, okay...?
There was a man who might've been hurt,@too...!
And...I smelled something really weird...

group_1.textRight: Didn't you hear me? Get the heck out of here@already.

group_1.textLeft: Wha... Excuse me?

group_1.textRight: I took care of the Witch, and there are no@suspicious guys around here.
This station's spotless and scent-free.
So hurry on home now.

group_1.textLeft: I can't!
If we leave the Witch alone, it's gonna do@something awful, and...

group_1.textRight: You'll be relieved to know the Witch has already@been taken care of, then.
Nagisa here is just that strong.

group_1.textLeft: ...Only the Witch?

group_1.textRight: I-I have no idea what else you're talking about.

group_1.textLeft: If you didn't see a man around earlier...
...and you swear you didn't smell anything...
I hope it was just my imagination.
Still, don't you think the Witch could've put@someone in danger?

group_1.textRight: I don't know anything about anything, but you@should stay out of it either way.
If you don't know what's going on...
...nothing good is gonna come from getting@involved!

group_1.textLeft: Do you...know what's happening after all?
Is there something that needs to be stopped?

group_1.textRight: I can't tell you the details. I'm on a mission of@my own!

group_1.textLeft: That doesn't make any sense...

group_1.textRight: Someone's stubborn...

group_1.textLeft: You're one to talk...

group_1.textRight: *Sigh*...
Are you, by chance...
...hoping to become like Tamaki Iroha by doing@this?
Doing a job that doesn't suit you is never gonna@work out.
Long story short, all you're gonna do is destroy@yourself.

group_1.textLeft: That's not it!
There's no way someone like me could ever be@like Tamaki-sa...
Wait.
You...know who that is?

group_1.textRight: Nagisa here is no ordinary person. Of course@she does!

group_1.textLeft: (I wonder if Tamaki-san saved her, too?)

group_1.textRight: A knockoff Iroha...
...can't take the place of the real thing.
You should hurry up and find something new and@important to do elsewhere.

group_1.textLeft: (I know that already...)
Didn't I just tell you I'm not trying to become@the next Tamaki-san?!
What's wrong with trying to help people,@anyway?!
We're Magical Girls, aren't we? I'm sure that@Tamaki-san would do the same!

group_1.textRight: You're a real piece of work.
Aren't you betraying Iroha...
...by treating the life she saved so lightly?

group_1.textLeft: Tch... [wait:1.2][chara:104300:cheek_1][chara:104300:face_mtn_ex_020.exp3.json][chara:104300:lipSynch_1]I am NOT going to die!
This is none of your business...!

group_1.textCenter: I feel like I changed Kuroe's fate...
I've gotta focus on fixing the big Hotsure...
...which means I can't dawdle around the smaller@ones!
I've gotta go find THAT person, stat...!
...Having to make that pile of corpses disappear@earlier...
...sure amplified the impurities I've been carrying@around...
Nonetheless, I'm an agent of the Law of Cycles...
To clean up my impurities without using@a Grief Seed, I've gotta...
...Is releasing my Doppel the only way...?
